nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
nodes.summary: Changelog for the Archon VS Code extension. Documents v0.1.0 initial release (2025-01-01) with 13 commands, Skills Explorer, Agents Panel, Pipelines Panel, Bundles Panel, Health Report, Status Bar, 5 settings, and cross-editor compatibility with VS Code, Cursor, and Windsurf.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: README for the Archon VS Code extension. Documents features including Skills Explorer (49+ skills), Agents Panel (8 agents), Pipeline Dashboard (5 pipelines), Bundle Management, Health Report, and Status Bar. Covers quick start, settings, and platform compatibility.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: VS Code extension manifest for Archon v1.0.0. Declares extension metadata (publisher: sufficientdaikon), activation events, sidebar views (Skills Explorer, Agents, Pipelines, Bundles, Synapses), 13 contributed commands (initialize, installSkill, runPipeline, showDashboard, runDoctor, etc.), and 5 configuration settings. Requires VS Code 1.85+.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the Archon VS Code extension. Targets ES2022 with CommonJS modules, strict mode enabled, source maps, declaration files, and resolveJsonModule. Compiles from src/ to out/.
